problem: Can ocean acidification be safely reversed — what biochemical approach?
hypothesis: Enzymatic depolymerization of specific polymer may resolve Can ocean acidification be safely reversed — what biochemical approach? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Life cycle assessment with 10 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
